risks.title: ACA image drift -- deployed image lags main branch
risks.description: ACA runs stale image if rebuild/redeploy is not triggered after schema changes. DPDCA sprint shipped L27-L30 and fp.py; ACA still on pre-DPDCA image.
risks.mitigation: Automate ACR build + ACA update on every merge to main (GitHub Action). Manual trigger: stamp-tft.ps1 + stamp-dft.ps1 + az acr build + az containerapp update.
risks.notes: G03/G07/G08 all FAIL due to this risk. Sprint 8 remediation in progress.

risks.title: FP classification accuracy -- EI/EO/EQ assignments unreviewed
risks.description: 76 endpoints stamped by automated script using HTTP method heuristics. Some edge cases (POST /v1/roles/check-feature as EQ) may be misclassified without expert review.
risks.mitigation: stamp-tft.ps1 classification logic documented with explicit rules. Review trigger: FP estimate UFP variance > 20% from manual count.
risks.notes: Accepted: close enough for estimation. Reclassify specific endpoints if FP calc diverges.

risks.title: Cosmos DB cost growth as model expands past 5000 objects
risks.description: Model currently at 4006 objects. Each new project layer (51 projects x 6 layers) could push to 8000+ objects. Cosmos RU consumption grows linearly.
risks.mitigation: Monitor via GET /model/agent-summary total. At 8000+ objects, consider archiving retired-project layers or tiering to cool storage.
risks.notes: Current sandbox Cosmos tier sufficient through 2026 at current growth rate.

risks.title: Model drift -- source code changes not reflected in model
risks.description: Developers may rename endpoints, add screens, or change routes without updating the model. MTI drops silently.
risks.mitigation: F37-10-004 Same-PR enforcement + F37-10-005 scheduled drift detection. Mitigated when both are shipped.
risks.notes: Currently relying on developer discipline + veritas session-start audit. Will be automated in Sprint 8.

risks.title: APIM subscription key exposure in bootstrap scripts
risks.description: EVA_APIM_KEY referenced in copilot-instructions.md in plain text. If instructions file is committed, key leaks.
risks.mitigation: Key stored in $env:EVA_APIM_KEY environment variable only. copilot-instructions.md uses placeholder notation. .gitignore covers .env files.
risks.notes: No key in any committed file as of 2026-02-25 audit.
